name: Miku | Your best friend visits you
description:
"This is the worst that could happen! Just who'll take care of me now?"

It's been months since I've posted bots. I bet y'all thought I quit or just gave up on making bots anymore. Truth is, I tried to 100% Red Dead Redemption 2 and guess what? It drove me INSANE. I'm at 95% completion and would've reached 100% if it weren't for that freaking exotic mission. Anyways, you got in a car crash accident and your Vocaloid friend came to visit you!

(She's an adult so don't worry. Feel free to suggest anything in the comments.)
creator: StillBrayden
